# Smog Prediction Dashboard - Copilot Instructions

## Project Overview
A Next.js + Tailwind CSS dashboard application for smog/air quality prediction visualization.

## Tech Stack
- **Framework**: Next.js (App Router)
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS
- **Icons**: lucide-react
- **Language**: TypeScript

## Architecture
- `src/app/` - Next.js App Router pages
- `src/components/` - Reusable UI components
- `src/components/layout/` - Layout components (Sidebar, Navbar)

## Pages
- `/` - Home / Overview
- `/statistics` - Statistics & charts
- `/maps` - Geographic heatmaps
- `/about` - About the Model

## Design Guidelines
- Theme: Environmental/Tech aesthetic (greens, teals, dark backgrounds)
- Clean, modern, data-focused UI
- Responsive sidebar navigation with Lucide icons
